text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember her, everyone? Do<n>you
remember the Umamusume<n>named
Matikanefukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
She was a greedy little girl with no<n>talent of her
own who trusted only in<n>luck to win the day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, that girl still took the Arima<n>Kinen. In
exchange, she gave up<n>everything she had.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But now she has become a god.<n>Having
transcended Umahood to<n>reach the divine realm,
her<n>pearlescent glow shines down upon—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! I'm still me! I'm still alive,<n>and kicking
harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My great health record is my best<n>feature, so
don't write me off just<n>yet! May your happiness
flourish like<n>a flower in full bloom—and peace reign
in the Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! Are you happy? Was<n>training me
worth it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniff! That's all I wanted to hear!All right! Now I just need to take thisenergy to the winner's interview!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, everyone. I'm afraid I've<n>gone and
made this joyous occasion<n>even more exuberant!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
After blessing the chrysanthemum<n>stage, fortune
has now smiled upon<n>Nakayama as well!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fortune smiles on those who wish for<n>it, and
happiness comes to those who<n>seek it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With that, I wish you all a happy New<n>Year! It will
be my extreme pleasure<n>to bring good cheer to all
of you again<n>next year!
